name: Baklava (Lebanese)
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Medium chopped walnuts or pistachio nuts
1 lb Drawn butter or sweet butter
recipeInstructions:
--------------------------------BASIC SYRUP--------------------------------
2 cups Sugar
1 cup Water
A few drops of Lemon juice
1 tsp Rose water
Preparation: Combine nuts, sugar, and rose water. Spread filo dough in a buttered 10 x 14 inch pan, brushing each layer with butter. Place half to three-quarter inch layer of nut mixture between some layers. Continue layering buttered filo on top. Cut into diamond-shaped pieces. Bake at 300 degrees Fahrenheit for one hour or until golden brown. Pour syrup over baklava, ensuring the dough is well saturated. Combine sugar, water, and lemon juice in a saucepan. Boil over medium heat for 10 to 15 minutes or until slightly viscous (225 degrees Fahrenheit). Add rose water before removing from heat and let cool completely.
